name: accounting firms processing 10–20 credit card transactions/day tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 credit card transactions/day, manual reconciliation causes significant time loss and potential errors. We automate the extraction and reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
target_audience: accounting firms processing 10–20 credit card transactions/day
problem_solved: Daily reconciliation of credit card transactions is time-consuming and error-prone.

locked_fields.primary_user: accounting firms processing 10–20 credit card transactions/day
locked_fields.primary_problem: Daily reconciliation of credit card transactions is time-consuming and error-prone.
